problem: Can superconductivity be achieved at room temperature — what material structure?
hypothesis: If Magnetohydrodynamic flow without moving parts is applied to what, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Calorimetric measurement with 11 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
